rulings.Case Title: LEADERS IN COMMUNITY ALTERNATIVES, INC. VS. G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel 1) Further Response To Req. For Production Documents No 31; 2) Production Of Documents 3) And Req. For Sanctions Against Deft And/Or Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, October 25, 2010, line 2, PLAINTIFF LEADERS IN COMMUNITY ALTERNATIVES, INC. Motion To Compel 1) Further Response To Req. For Production Documents No. 31; 2) Production Of Documents 3) And Req. For Sanctions Against Defendant And/Or Counsel. GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST FURTHER RESPOND, SUPPLY THE REQUESTED DOCUMENTS, AND REMIT REASONABLE SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,200 TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: EDITH WONG VS. SUET YIM DIANA LAU et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, October 25, 2010, line 1, CROSS-DEFENDANT JEFFREY LEE DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MUST PLEAD FACTS ESTABLISHING THAT LEE WAS A TENANT OR FACTS OTHERWISE SHOWING THE EXISTENCE OF AN AGREEMENT BETWEEN CROSS-COMPLAINANT LAU AND CROSS-DEFENDANT LEE. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LETITIA PONCIANO-GALAPIA VS. EUREST SERVICES, INC., AKA EUREST, DBA SKY HIGH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, October 25, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT EUREST SERVICES, INC., AKA EUREST, DBA SKY HIGH'S Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default. GRANTED. DEFENDANT DEMONSTRATES A REASONABLE EXCUSE AND EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. THE APPLICATION IS TIMELY AND ATTACHES A PROPOSED ANSWER. THE LAW FAVORS ADJUDICATION ON THE MERITS. =(302/CWW)
